title: Senior Teacher - IIT Madras - Growth Opportunity

jsonLd.title: Senior Teacher - IIT Madras - Growth Opportunity
jsonLd.description:
IIT Madras, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Senior Teacher for our Faridabad operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About IIT Madras:
IIT Madras is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in E-learning

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Learning & development budget
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Faridabad, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IIT Madras!
